title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
summary_full: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.
summary_public: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.
